title: daemon starts with pub_id='no_identity' when keyfile absent
description: daemon/src/main.rs falls back to my_pub_id='no_identity' when keyfile absent. This non-hex string becomes the JMAP accountId. Any write (Message/set create, Space/set, etc.) stores sender_id='no_identity' in the DB. A later session with a real key will have corrupt contact/message rows associating messages with a phantom sender. Expected: refuse to start or disable all write routes when keyfile is absent.
